message:
fix(mcp): use server-side unassigned filter instead of post-filtering

Replace client-side filtering of unassigned issues (fetch all open →
filter where assignee is None) with the ListFilters::unassigned flag,
pushing the filter to the storage layer. This reduces memory usage
and query time for projects with many assigned issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
